calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Linehan (Petitioner) in Propria Persona. Daniel Linehan also present.

The Court stated that the petition appeared to be in order and granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Death (subject to Ms. Linehan submitting an order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
